sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Jumia Technologies AG (JMIA) seen Nearing Full-Year Profitability amid Ongoing GMV Growth
feed.summary: Jumia Technologies AG is projected to reach EBITDA break-even by Q4 2026 and full-year profitability in 2027, according to Cantor Fitzgerald. Despite Q4 2025 revenue slightly missing expectations, the company saw significant GMV growth of 36% year-over-year and narrowed its adjusted EBITDA loss. Jumia plans to focus on refining its market footprint, optimizing costs, and leveraging operations, with anticipated GMV growth of 27-32% for Q1 and full-year 2026.

feed.title: Ray J Sued by American Express for Unpaid Balance of $78K
feed.summary: American Express is suing Ray J for breach of contract, claiming he owes the company $78,704.56 for an unpaid credit card balance. The lawsuit also targets Rajun Cajun Inc., a business linked to Ray J. Sources indicate Ray J intends to pay the debt, and this is not the first time he has faced such a lawsuit from American Express.

feed.title: Joint Corp. price target lowered to $12 from $14 at Roth Capital
feed.summary: Roth Capital lowered its price target for Joint Corp. (JYNT) to $12 from $14, while maintaining a Buy rating. This decision follows Joint Corp.'s Q4 results exceeding estimates and 2026 guidance largely aligning with Roth's model. However, the analyst expressed that management's post-refranchising pro forma model is "underwhelming" despite long-term upside potential.

feed.title: Does The Recent Pullback Make NetApp (NTAP) Look Attractive On Valuation Grounds?
feed.summary: NetApp (NTAP) shares have seen a recent pullback but appear attractive on valuation grounds based on Simply Wall St's analysis. The company is considered undervalued by 44.6% using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, implying an intrinsic value of US$178.17 per share against its current price of US$98.66. Additionally, NetApp's P/E ratio of 16.1x is below both the Tech industry average and Simply Wall St's calculated "Fair Ratio" of 24.9x, further suggesting undervaluation.

feed.title: KORU Medical Systems Announces EU MDR Certification for the Freedom60® Infusion Pump With Prefilled
feed.summary: KORU Medical Systems announced that its Freedom60® Infusion Pump, designed for use with 50 mL prefilled syringes, has received EU MDR certification. This certification allows for commercialization across the EU and expands access to its system, which supports the growing use of prefilled syringes in subcutaneous immunoglobulin (SCIg) therapy. The company emphasizes that this advancement simplifies home infusion for patients and offers flexibility in dosing regimens, building on features that reduce preparation and improve patient independence.

feed.title: KVH Industries Inc Stock (ISIN: US49836J1034) Gains Momentum Amid Satellite Connectivity Demand
feed.summary: KVH Industries Inc stock surged 10.53% to $7.45 on March 12, 2026, driven by growing demand for its satellite connectivity solutions in the maritime and defense sectors. The company specializes in hybrid GEO-LEO networks and user-friendly hardware, serving commercial shipping, energy exploration, and defense. Despite mixed technical signals, analysts maintain a Hold/Accumulate rating, recognizing KVH's potential in niche markets amid increasing global connectivity needs and resilient government contracts.

feed.title: Globe Life Inc Stock (ISIN: US3765361038) Faces Headwinds Amid Insurance Sector Pressures
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc (ISIN: US3765361038) is navigating regulatory scrutiny and competitive pressures within the life insurance market. Despite steady premium growth and strong free cash flow, the company faces challenges from higher claims costs and a Department of Justice investigation into sales practices. The article highlights the firm's robust investment income due to higher yields and its appeal to DACH investors seeking diversification and a hedge against eurozone volatility.

feed.title: Investigation announced for Long-Term Investors in shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE)
feed.summary: An investigation has been announced for long-term investors in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) shares regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its directors and officers. This follows a lawsuit alleging that the company made false impressions about its leasing spreads, development pipeline, and occupancy growth, particularly concerning its Long Island City property, while minimizing macroeconomic risks. Shares of ARE declined significantly between March and December 2025.

feed.title: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE: BAX) Long Term Investor Alert: Investigation of potential Wrongdoing
feed.summary: An investigation has been launched on behalf of long-term investors in Baxter International Inc. (NYSE: BAX) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its directors. This follows a lawsuit alleging that between May 25, 2022, and February 8, 2023, the company made false statements and concealed the true extent of its supply chain problems, leading to a significant decline in stock price. Current long-term investors are encouraged to contact the Shareholders Foundation to discuss their options.

feed.title: These Hyatt Inclusive Properties Will be Featured in "The Bachelor"
feed.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation announced that its Inclusive Collection will be featured in two upcoming episodes of "The Bachelor." The episodes, airing March 17 and March 24, will showcase four of its Punta Cana, Dominican Republic resorts: Secrets Tides Punta Cana, Zoetry Agua Punta Cana, Breathless Punta Cana Resort & Spa, and Dreams Onyx Resort & Spa. The Bachelor, Grant Ellis, will use these resorts as settings for dates during his search for a partner.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Inc.: The Unsexy Stock Gen Z Might Be Sleeping On
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. (STLD) is presented as a profitable, US-based steel producer and metal recycler that benefits from infrastructure spending, reshoring, and the energy transition. Despite not being a "sexy" stock, it's highlighted for its strong cash flow, shareholder-friendly practices, and efficient electric arc furnace technology. Investors are encouraged to consider STLD as a quality cyclical industrial for long-term diversification, particularly due to its deep ties to the American manufacturing and infrastructure build-out.

feed.title: James Hardie Industries plc (NYSE: JHX) Long Term Investor Alert: Investigation of potential Wrongdoing
feed.summary: An investigation has been launched by a law firm on behalf of long-term investors in James Hardie Industries plc (NYSE: JHX) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its directors and officers. This follows a lawsuit alleging securities law violations where the company is accused of falsely assuring investors about the strength of its North American fiber cement segment despite inventory destocking and what is described as "fraudulent channel stuffing." Shares of JHX declined significantly in August 2025 after the company revealed that destocking would impact sales for several quarters.

feed.title: Dr. Reddy’s (NYSE: RDY) partner halts TACTI-004 Phase III Eftilagimod alfa trial
feed.summary: Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories announced that its partner, Immutep, has halted the TACTI-004 Phase III trial of Eftilagimod alfa for non-small cell lung cancer due to an independent data monitoring committee's recommendation after a futility analysis. This decision leads to the discontinuation of the trial, an enrollment halt, and a wind-down process. Dr. Reddy’s subsidiary, which holds commercial rights in several territories, has only made the upfront payment and is discussing next steps with Immutep, whose broader pipeline for Eftilagimod alfa remains in focus.

feed.title: Intellicheck Inc Stock (ISIN: US45817G1022) Gains Traction on New Desktop ID Verification Launch
feed.summary: Intellicheck Inc (IDN) is gaining investor interest after launching a new frictionless Desktop Application for identity verification, despite a recent 7.5% stock dip, it shows a 106.1% gain over the past year. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target of $8.00 per share, citing the potential for recurring revenue from its innovative, plug-and-play solution targeting high-fraud sectors. The company's focus on an efficient, lean business model and compliant verification technology positions it for continued growth in the cybersecurity market.

feed.title: Brock-Kyle, Kelly services director, buys $1,477 in KELYA stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Angela Brock-Kyle, a director at Kelly Services Inc (NASDAQ:KELYA), recently purchased 100 shares of Class B Common Stock for $1,477 on March 4, 2026. This transaction occurred before a sharp decline in the stock price, which is now trading significantly lower and near its 52-week low. The company is also undergoing leadership changes with Joel Leege's appointment and a forthcoming sale of a controlling interest in its voting Class B common stock.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Starts Coverage of Hasbro (HAS), Sees Balanced Risk and Reward
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage of Hasbro (HAS) with an Equal Weight rating and a $98 price target, stating that risk and reward are balanced. Despite challenges in the toy industry and market share loss, Hasbro's CEO Chris Cocks highlighted significant growth in Q4 2025 revenue and operating profit, driven by its "Playing to Win" strategy and strong performance in segments like Wizards of the Coast. The company also announced new licensing partnerships, including with Harry Potter, Voltron, and Street Fighter, expected to launch in late 2026 and 2027.

feed.title: International Business Machines (IBM) Unveils Industry’s First Quantum-Centric Supercomputing Architecture
feed.summary: IBM has introduced the industry's first quantum-centric supercomputing architecture, designed to merge quantum processors with traditional CPUs and GPUs. This innovation creates a unified computing environment for complex scientific research, using open software like Qiskit. The company anticipates this will lead to new scalable applications in molecular simulation and engineering, further pushing scientific boundaries.

feed.title: The Walt Disney Company Names Paul Roeder as Chief Communications Officer
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company has appointed Paul Roeder as its new Chief Communications Officer, reporting directly to incoming CEO Josh D’Amaro. Roeder, who has been with Disney for 25 years, will be responsible for leading global communications strategies for the company. This appointment is part of a broader leadership reshuffle as D’Amaro prepares to take on the CEO role.

feed.title: Duke Energy Corp Stock (ISIN: US26441C2044) Rises Amid Utility Resilience and Dilution Concerns
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corp (DUK) stock rose 1.01% to $133.15, outperforming the market despite a broader decline, driven by investor optimism over its $103 billion capital plan focusing on renewables and grid modernization. This resilience highlights the defensive appeal of regulated utilities, even as a new $6 billion equity program raises some dilution concerns. The article emphasizes Duke's strong fundamentals, strategic positioning in key growth areas like data centers, and its appeal to both U.S. and European investors seeking stability and regulated returns.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated Stock (ISIN: US7475251036) Faces Pressure Amid Insider Selling and Bearish Forecasts
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (ISIN: US7475251036) is currently trading around $131, facing pressure due to a recent insider sale and bearish short-term forecasts. Technical indicators show sell signals, and the stock is below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages, suggesting caution for investors. While Qualcomm's business model benefits from licensing and strong margins in areas like 5G and AI, geopolitical risks with China and soft smartphone demand could impact future performance.

feed.title: FirstEnergy (FE) price target increased by BofA on peer multiple expansion
feed.summary: BofA Securities has raised its price target for FirstEnergy (FE) from $41.00 to $43.00, while maintaining a Neutral rating. The revision is based on peer multiple expansion, indicating a positive market sentiment for utility sector valuations. This adjustment in price target reflects BofA's updated assessment of FirstEnergy's valuation in comparison to its industry peers.

feed.title: Assessing T-Mobile US (TMUS) Valuation As New Device Offers And 5G Services Target Growth
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has launched new device and value offers for Apple products, focusing on customer acquisition and loyalty. While the company's past share performance has shown significant gains, recent momentum has cooled. The article evaluates TMUS's valuation, presenting a "Most Popular Narrative" that suggests the stock is 7.8% overvalued based on a fair value of $201.69, primarily due to future earnings multiples and steady growth expectations. However, a different Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests a fair value of $562.53, indicating a potential large discount.

feed.title: Barclays Updates Life Insurance Coverage, Lowers Prudential Financial (PRU) Target
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Prudential Financial (PRU) to $119 from $124, while maintaining an Equal Weight rating, after reviewing the life insurance group's cash flow and private credit exposures. This adjustment follows Prudential's announcement of a voluntary 90-day pause on new sales in Japan due to employee misconduct, a move expected to reduce 2026 pretax adjusted operating income by $300M to $350M. The company is implementing corrective measures, including strengthening oversight, restructuring compensation, and enhancing training.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Inc Stock Navigates Earnings Beat and Technical Pressure as Analyst Targets Rise
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc (ISIN: US4432011082) reported a strong Q4 2025 earnings beat with $1.05 EPS against $0.97 expected, and revenue up 14.6% to $2.17 billion. Despite the positive results and raised analyst targets, including JPMorgan's $265, the stock experienced immediate profit-taking, signalling a conflict between strong fundamentals and near-term technical pressure. Investors are now at a critical decision point, balancing the company's growth trajectory in aerospace and defense against an elevated valuation and recent technical weakness.

feed.title: T. Rowe (TROW) Price Reports $1.80T in AUM for February, Launches Emerging Markets Research ETF
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: TROW) reported that its assets under management for February reached $1.80 trillion, a slight increase from the previous month, despite net outflows of $5.3 billion. The firm also expanded its ETF offerings by launching the T. Rowe Price Emerging Markets Equity Research ETF (TEMR), which began trading on NYSE Arca and aims for long-term capital growth in emerging markets. This new ETF utilizes a structured research approach similar to its other successful equity research funds.

feed.title: HealthStream (NASDAQ:HSTM) Declares Stock Buyback Program
feed.summary: HealthStream (NASDAQ:HSTM) announced that its Board of Directors has approved a stock buyback program of $10.0 million, allowing the repurchase of up to 1.7% of its shares. This decision often signals the board's belief that the company's shares are undervalued. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Buy on 3M Company (MMM) March 2026
feed.summary: UBS reaffirmed its Buy rating on 3M Company (MMM) on March 13, 2026, signaling ongoing confidence in the company's mid- and long-term prospects. This maintained rating did not include a new price target and resulted in a muted market reaction, with MMM stock moving down slightly by 0.23%. Meyka AI also rates MMM with a 'B' grade, considering various financial and market performance metrics.

feed.title: Has Mohawk Industries (MHK) Become More Attractive After Recent 24% Share Price Slide
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries (MHK) has experienced a 24% share price decline over the last 30 days, prompting a valuation analysis. Based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison, Simply Wall St suggests the stock is currently undervalued. The article encourages investors to use their platform's "Narratives" feature for personalized valuation assessments.

feed.title: A Look At Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation As New Zealand Plant Closures Reshape Its Regional Footprint
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) is undergoing a significant operational shift by closing facilities in New Zealand, which will impact around 350 jobs and reshape its regional presence. This move is a response to challenging conditions and financial losses, prompting investors to assess the company's profitability and efficiency. Despite a recent share price decline and weak momentum, analysts view KHC as 16.8% undervalued at US$22.58, with a fair value closer to the high $20s, based on a narrative of earnings rebuild through portfolio optimization.

feed.title: Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE:IIPR) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $1.90
feed.summary: Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (NYSE:IIPR) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.90 per share, to be paid on April 15th to shareholders of record on March 31st. This equates to an annualized dividend of $7.60 with a yield of approximately 14.4%. While the current payout ratio of 176.7% suggests the company is using its balance sheet to fund dividends, analysts project a future payout ratio of around 86.0% based on next year's EPS estimates.

feed.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte 2026: Why Starbucks' icon stays unstoppable
feed.summary: The article discusses the enduring cultural and commercial dominance of Starbucks' Pumpkin Spice Latte (PSL) in 2026. It highlights the drink's strategic importance as a revenue driver, its status as a seasonal icon creating scarcity-driven demand, and its ability to maintain relevance through consistency, subtle variations, and robust supply chains. The PSL's success is attributed to its emotional resonance with consumers and its role in increasing Starbucks' stock value through boosted sales and customer loyalty.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Stock Faces Short-Term Pressure Amid Downtrend, Analysts Eye Upside to $388
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) stock experienced a 1.56% decline to $317.70 on March 12, 2026, extending a short-term downtrend, according to reports. Despite current technical forecasts signaling potential further weakness, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, with price targets reaching up to $420, implying over 16% upside from recent levels. The company's market leadership, recent Q4 beat, and strategic expansions like the Suvinil deal contribute to this optimistic long-term outlook.

feed.title: Corning Ties PRIZM TMT To AI Data Center Growth Story
feed.summary: Corning has announced a new licensing agreement for its PRIZM TMT optical ferrule technology, partnering with US Conec, Fujikura, and Sumitomo Electric Lightwave. This collaboration aims to advance high-density optical connectivity specifically for next-generation AI data centers, addressing the need for higher fiber density and improved contamination resistance. The move positions Corning's technology as a key component in AI-driven infrastructure, broadening its participation in the high-density optical link supply chain.

feed.title: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. Notice of April 13, 2026 Application Deadline for Class Action Lawsuit - Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq. at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Before Application Deadline
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has announced a class action securities lawsuit against Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KD) for investors who suffered losses between August 7, 2024, and February 9, 2026, due to alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit stems from Kyndryl's disclosure of material weaknesses in internal controls and the departure of its CFO and General Counsel, which led to a significant stock price drop. The deadline for investors to apply to be lead plaintiff is April 13, 2026.

feed.title: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) Experiences Sharper Decline Compared to Overall Market: Essential Information for Investors
feed.summary: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) saw a sharper decline than the overall market recently, though its shares have risen over the past month, outperforming its sector and the S&P 500. Investors are anticipating its upcoming earnings report, with analysts forecasting growth in both earnings and revenue for the fiscal year. However, the company currently holds a Zacks Rank of #5 (Strong Sell) due to recent negative analyst estimate revisions, despite a low Forward P/E ratio.

feed.title: A Look At InterDigital (IDCC) Valuation As DVB World 2026 Puts Its AI Streaming Tech In Focus
feed.summary: InterDigital (IDCC) is gaining attention due to its upcoming presentation at DVB World 2026, where it will showcase its AI-driven Pixel Value Reduction technology for energy-efficient video streaming. The company's stock, currently at US$359.07, is considered undervalued by financial analysts, with an assessed fair value of $475.20, largely based on its transformation into an AI and 6G research firm. However, a Simply Wall St DCF model suggests the stock is expensive at a fair value of $165.88, indicating mixed messages on its true valuation.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Finance Of America Companies Inc. Class A (FOA) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article provides a precision trading analysis for Finance Of America Companies Inc. Class A (FOA), highlighting weak near and mid-term sentiment but a neutral long-term outlook. It outlines institutional trading strategies including long, breakout, and short positions with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels. The analysis also details support and resistance signals across different time horizons, all generated by AI models to optimize trading and manage risk.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corp. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Mixed Performance Indicators
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corp. has revised its stock evaluation, with its stock currently priced at $902.17. Despite a recent drop from $940.48, the company has shown strong performance with a 47.14% return over the past year and 166.54% over three years, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. Technical indicators present a mixed outlook, with both bullish and bearish trends depending on the timeframe.

feed.title: A Look At Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Valuation After New Crypto And Proxy Voting Expansions
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) has expanded its reach into digital assets by adding Crypto.com to its NYFIX network and upgraded its shareholder engagement tools. Despite a recent share price decline, longer-term holders have seen significant gains, and the company is currently valued at a 43.15% intrinsic discount by Simply Wall St, with a fair value pegged at $245.88. This valuation is supported by Broadridge's recurring revenue models, high client retention, and consistent EPS growth, though potential risks from event-driven revenues or slower sales cycles exist.

feed.title: Apollo Global Management, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Undisclosed Relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and 16% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has announced a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (APO) for allegedly failing to disclose material information regarding communications between its leadership and Jeffrey Epstein, leading to a 16% stock decline. Investors who purchased Apollo securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, have until May 1, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff. KSF asserts that Apollo's claims of no business with Epstein were untrue, harming the company's reputation and rendering its business statements false and misleading.

feed.title: Uber co-founder Travis Kalanick launches robotics venture Atoms
feed.summary: Uber co-founder Travis Kalanick has launched a new robotics startup called Atoms Inc., which will leverage assets from his previous company City Storage Systems and acquire autonomous driving startup Pronto AI Inc. Atoms aims to develop specialized robots for restaurants, logistics, and mining sectors, focusing on automating tasks with productive machines rather than humanoid robots. Uber is expected to provide significant backing for this new venture.

feed.title: CarMax Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated an investigation into CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its officers and directors following disappointing financial results and the unexpected departure of its CEO. The investigation stems from a securities class action lawsuit against the company and its executives for allegedly failing to disclose material information. KSF invites affected CarMax shareholders to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Expeditors International Stock (ISIN: US3026351093) Faces Institutional Selling Pressure Amid Mixed Analyst Views
feed.summary: Expeditors International (EXPD) is experiencing institutional selling pressure, with Vestcor Inc. significantly reducing its stake, despite high overall institutional ownership at 94%. The logistics provider is trading near $143, but faces a 'Reduce' consensus rating and an average price target of $134.30 due to revenue declines and cautious guidance in a softening freight demand environment. While recent earnings beat EPS estimates, concerns over global trade slowdowns and pricing pressures are weighing on investor sentiment.

feed.title: Horizon Bancorp Inc Stock (ISIN: US4404521020) Holds Steady Amid Solid Capital Position and Regional Banking Focus
feed.summary: Horizon Bancorp Inc stock closed at $15.92 on March 12, 2026, showing stability despite challenging interest rates for regional banks. The company maintains a robust balance sheet with $6.4 billion in assets and $5.3 billion in deposits, and strong capital ratios well above regulatory minimums. Investors, including those in the DACH region, see Horizon Bancorp as a stable regional U.S. banking exposure with potential for consistent payouts.

feed.title: CarMax Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated an investigation into CarMax, Inc. and its officers and directors following disappointing financial results and the unexpected departure of its CEO. The investigation focuses on whether fiduciary duties were breached or federal laws violated, after a securities class action lawsuit was filed alleging failure to disclose material information. KSF encourages long-term CarMax shareholders with relevant information to contact the firm.

feed.title: Jennifer Kirk Buys 1,000 Shares of Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) Stock
feed.summary: Jennifer Kirk, a Director at Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE), purchased 1,000 shares of the company's stock for $93,440 on March 12th. This transaction followed Sempra Energy raising its quarterly dividend to $0.6575 and reporting an EPS beat in its recent earnings. Analyst sentiment for Sempra Energy is currently a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $100.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Abbott Laboratories (ABT) March 13, 2026
feed.summary: UBS has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Abbott Laboratories (ABT) as of March 13, 2026, citing continued strong demand in its medical-device and diagnostics divisions. The firm did not issue a new price target, implying a reinforcement of previous valuations rather than a new reset. This maintained rating signals ongoing confidence in Abbott's growth drivers, with a minimal short-term market reaction observed.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. Target of Unusually High Options Trading (NYSE:MRK)
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) experienced unusually high options trading on Friday, with investors purchasing 672,962 call options, marking a 1,339% increase in daily call volume. The company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $126.81, following recent analyst price target increases. Merck also beat its Q4 earnings estimates with $2.04 EPS and $16.4 billion in revenue and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.85 per share.

feed.title: Korea Electric Power (ADR) Stock Gains Traction Amid Utility Sector Momentum
feed.summary: Korea Electric Power (ADR) stock (KEP) is showing short-term upside potential, attracting interest from European investors due to its resilience in the utility sector. Analysts forecast significant gains, with expectations of a 49.50% rise over the next three months. KEP's strong position in South Korea's energy market, balancing nuclear, coal, and renewables, alongside its predictable regulated tariffs, makes it an attractive defensive play despite mixed technical signals and geopolitical risks.

feed.title: IQVIA Rises 1.1% on Light Trading and Mixed Institutional Activity
feed.summary: IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) saw a 1.10% stock rise on March 13, 2026, despite light trading volume and mixed institutional activity, with some large investors decreasing holdings while smaller firms increased theirs. Analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating, projecting a potential 38% upside, affirming confidence in IQVIA's strategic position and strong financial performance. The company's updated 2026 guidance and consistent revenue growth underscore its leadership in healthcare analytics, balancing short-term valuation concerns with long-term optimism.
